en.name: AnSheZhang Cold Noodles + Kimchi Combo
en.shortDescription: AnSheZhang Cold Noodles + Kimchi Combo — traditional Korean-style cold noodles. Ready-to-cook.
en.description: AnSheZhang Cold Noodles + Kimchi Combo is a premium Chinese agricultural product sourced from Liaoning, Shenyang. Carefully selected, quality-controlled, and packaged for export. Suitable for wholesale distribution, food service, and retail.
